h1.visual_description: Centered, large serif font, bold, title case, multiple lines if necessary.
h1.example_text: Restrictions on Land Ownership by Foreigners in Selected Jurisdictions

h2.visual_description: Centered, medium serif font, italicized, subtitle style.
h2.example_text: Staff of the Global Legal Research Directorate

h3.visual_description: Left-aligned, bold serif font, prefixed with Roman numerals (e.g., I., II.).

visual_matchers.pattern: Bolded country names within body text
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Key entities/jurisdictions being highlighted for quick reference.
Footnote citations linking to the bottom of the page.

visual_matchers.pattern: Horizontal rule at bottom of page
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Separator between primary body text and footnote/metadata section.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Footnotes with superscript markers; full bibliographic details provided at the bottom of the page including URLs and legal citations (e.g., U.N.T.S.).

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Bottom footer contains 'The Law Library of Congress' on the left and the page number on the right in a light gray font.
